# coolify_scheduled_tasks (Data Source)

Lists all scheduled tasks for a Coolify application or service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List scheduled tasks for an application
data "coolify_scheduled_tasks" "app_tasks" {
  application_uuid = "your-app-uuid"
}

output "task_names" {
  value = [for t in data.coolify_scheduled_tasks.app_tasks.tasks : t.name]
}

# List scheduled tasks for a service
data "coolify_scheduled_tasks" "svc_tasks" {
  service_uuid = "your-service-uuid"
}

output "svc_task_names" {
  value = [for t in data.coolify_scheduled_tasks.svc_tasks.tasks : t.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `application_uuid` (String) The UUID of the application. Exactly one of `application_uuid` or `service_uuid` must be provided.
- `service_uuid` (String) The UUID of the service. Exactly one of `application_uuid` or `service_uuid` must be provided.

### Read-Only

- `tasks` (Attributes List) The list of scheduled tasks. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tasks))

<a id="nestedatt--tasks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tasks`

Read-Only:

- `command` (String) The command to execute.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the task is enabled.
- `frequency` (String) The cron expression.
- `name` (String) The name of the scheduled task.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the scheduled task.
